---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to Velune
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user or developer problem. Explain the workflow that is difficult
today rather than starting with a preferred implementation.

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the behavior and API you expect from the user's perspective.

```tsx
// Optional API sketch
```

## Alternatives

Describe existing components, composition patterns, or external libraries you
considered.

## Accessibility and Compatibility

Explain keyboard, screen reader, RTL, reduced-motion, form, SSR, or browser
requirements that apply.

## Scope

- Affected package or component:
- Breaking change: yes / no / unknown
- Documentation or migration work required:

New components and broad public API changes may require an RFC before
implementation.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and discussions.
- [ ] This request describes a reusable library concern rather than
      application-specific business logic.
- [ ] I considered whether existing compound components can solve the problem.
